name: PT Intikeramik Alamasri Industri Tbk
summary: PT Intikeramik Alamasri Industri Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, distributes, and sells porcelain tiles in Indonesia and internationally. The company operates in two segments, Ceramic Industry and Hotel Industry. It also engages in the hospitality business. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Central Jakarta, Indonesia.
